name: Baked Corn and Oysters
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup milk or liquid from canned oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the corn and cracker crumbs.
2. Add the beaten eggs, salt, milk (or oyster liquid), black pepper, sugar, and melted butter to the corn mixture.
3. Stir in the fresh oysters until evenly distributed throughout the dish.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
6. Do not over bake; if the oysters become tough, remove from heat and serve immediately.
